elements.description: ระดับอ้างอิง ±0.00, ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 +0.60, ระดับพื้นชั้น 2 +3.75, ระดับคานหลังคา +6.65 (height chain 0.60 + 3.15 + 2.90 = 6.65)
'ราวกันตก ดูแบบขยาย A-21' — 2nd-floor balcony/ระเบียง guardrail at the upper-left, roughly grid1-2 x above +3.75, in front of a recessed balcony opening
two window openings tagged hexagon '1', upper floor, flanking the balcony recess
window opening tagged box '4', lower/ground floor, right side
two window openings tagged hexagon '1', lower/ground floor, left side (X-hatched panel, likely representing the ครัว/ทานอาหาร window bank)

warnings: GRID-RELEVANT (reporting only, master file not edited): the bottom dimension chain reads '0.20 | 1.10 | 3.50 | 3.00 | 0.50 | 0.80' with a secondary grouping '1.30 | 6.50 | 1.30' — exactly matches the master grid's x_lines (1=0.0,2=3.5,3=6.5) plus dummy grids 1'(-1.10)/3'(7.0), consistent with the 1.30m total overhang figure seen on the roof plan (หน้า08).

This elevation corresponds to compass-slot '1' on the floor plan's 4-way elevation callout bubble (referencing sheet A-07) — cardinal direction (e.g. north/south) not independently confirmed from this sheet alone, only the sheet-to-slot mapping.

Flat parapet-topped facade with a plain fascia band at the roof edge (no cornice/บัวปูนปั้น detail called out on this particular elevation, unlike the 1-story sister houses' equivalent sheet) — the 2nd-floor balcony recess with guardrail is the most distinctive feature of this elevation, consistent with it facing the ระเบียง/นอน1 side of the upper floor plan (หน้า07).
Individual door/window opening-number-to-D/W-schedule cross-match not confidently resolvable at this resolution — see _หน้า16_door_window_schedule.json for the schedule itself.
